prompt:
改写这段Methods部分：

We conducted the experiment in a controlled laboratory. The sample size was 100 participants. We used a randomized controlled trial design. The data was collected using surveys and interviews. We analyzed the data using SPSS software.

assertions.text: Uses past tense for completed actions
Uses passive voice appropriately for Methods section
Preserves methodological details (sample size, design, tools)
No more than 5 consecutive words match the original
